segments.speaker: 题目17/18
segments.text: Listen to a conversation. Have you heard about the church that the University orchestra is putting on in the park? I know you're a big fan of classical music. I am. I'm already going with a group of friends. You should come with us. Thanks. I'd love to. So how much your tickets? You only have to pay if you sit in the seats up close near the stage. We're all going to bring blankets and just sit on the grass a little farther back. Good idea. I'll bring a blanket too.
